recommendations.title: Hell Baby
recommendations.overview: After she and her husband move into a haunted house, a woman gives birth to a demonic infant that wreaks havoc.

recommendations.title: Reno 911!: The Hunt for QAnon

recommendations.title: Balls of Fury
recommendations.overview: Randy Daytona was a child ping pong prodigy who lost his chance at Olympic gold when his father is murdered by the mysterious Feng over a gambling debt. 15yrs later he's down on his luck and scraping a living doing seedy back room shows in Vegas; whe

recommendations.title: Herbie Fully Loaded
recommendations.overview: Maggie Peyton, the new owner of Number 53 - the free-wheelin' Volkswagen bug with a mind of its own - puts the car through its paces on the road to becoming a NASCAR competitor.

recommendations.title: Chak De! India
recommendations.overview: A team of rag-tag girls with their own agenda form Team India competing for international fame in field hockey. Their coach, the ex-men's Indian National team captain, returns from a life of shame after being unjustly accused of match fixing in his l

recommendations.title: Spring Breakdown
recommendations.overview: Three women in their thirties head to a popular Spring Break destination and try to relive the Spring Break they never had.

recommendations.title: The Rip
recommendations.overview: Trust frays when a team of Miami cops discovers millions in cash inside a run-down stash house, calling everyone — and everything — into question.

recommendations.title: Fear Below
recommendations.overview: A rag-tag team of divers attempting to salvage a sunken car from a river are thwarted by a highly aggressive bull shark.

recommendations.title: Logorama
recommendations.overview: Two cops portrayed by Michelin Men chase an armed Ronald McDonald through the streets of a fictionalized, stylized city.
recommendations.director: Ludovic Houplain, François Alaux, Hervé de Crécy

recommendations.title: Bad Boys for Life
recommendations.overview: Marcus and Mike are forced to confront new threats, career changes, and midlife crises as they join the newly created elite team AMMO of the Miami police department to take down the ruthless Armando Armas, the vicious leader of a Miami drug cartel.
